name: Set of 2 30" Dax Faux Leather Barstool Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Modern Low Back, Steel Frame
description:
Perch yourself at your home bar or kitchen island and enjoy the sun filtering through your windows as you savor a delectable breakfast. Our barstool set is a stunning addition to any home with its curved seating and sleek matte base. Featuring a faux snakeskin design with intricate stitching, these barstools will instantly upgrade your decor with a touch of modern. Not only are they the perfect bar height but they also feature a stylish, beautifully curved foot rails that provide an extra boost comfort while you wine and dine.

MODERN DESIGN: With clean, precise lines, our barstool set is the ideal modern accessory for your interior space. Finished with curved seating contrasted with sleek straight legs, these stools not only offers a chic, minimalistic look but also provides incredible structure.

UPHOLSTERED: Our barstool set is generously upholstered, giving any room a refined appearance. This provides a smooth, immaculate texture for this piece as well as a cushioned seat for comfort.

STEEL FRAME: The legs of these stools consist of steel material, making this incredibly durable and ensures that these will hold up under use. Finished with a matte black color, this frame emphasizes its modern style.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. Each stool is 18.75” W x 20.25” D x 37.00” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming barstool set.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this set of barstools. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included. This comes as a set of two.
